published_deploy.name: fantastic-phoenix-2b1df6
published_deploy.title:
feat: enhance security, add testing infrastructure, and improve error handling

Security Improvements:
- Add input validation middleware in server.js (validatePrompt, validateContent, validateOptimize)
- Add sanitizeString function to prevent XSS and injection attacks
- Remove direct OpenAI client from browser - now uses Edge Functions or simulation mode
- Add proper validation for API endpoints (maxTokens, temperature, platform whitelist)

Testing Infrastructure:
- Add vitest configuration with jsdom environment
- Add @testing-library/react and @testing-library/jest-dom for component testing
- Add @vitest/coverage-v8 for code coverage
- Add test setup file and logger tests

Error Handling:
- Add ErrorBoundary component to catch React rendering errors
- Add proper error handling in main.tsx with logging utility

New Features:
- Add ApiKeyContext for managing AI provider API keys (OpenAI, Gemini)
- Add ApiKeyModal component for user-friendly API key entry
- Add RequireApiKey component to protect features requiring API keys

Code Cleanup:
- Remove unused redirect utilities (redirectToNetlify.js, redirectUtils.js)
- Remove unused components (ConnectionStatusBar, EnhancedImageCreator, ImageGallery, etc.)
- Remove unused services (enhancedGeminiService)

Build Improvements:
- Improve Vite code splitting configuration
- Add Stripe vendor chunk for better bundle optimization

Documentation:
- Add openapi.yaml for API documentation
